title: Judge Non-Stick Square 9" Cake Tin with Loose Base, Dishwasher Safe 23cm x 23cm x 8cm - 5 Year Guarantee
features: LARGE DEEP SQUARE CAKE TIN WITH LOOSE BASE - perfect for deep fruit cakes, cheese cakes and more - cake is easy to remove when done by simply pushing the base up through the tin
BUILT TO LAST - every baking tin is extensively tested to ensure it does not bend or flex and guarantee you reliably good results for years to come
2 COAT NON-STICK COATING - for excellent performance, so that bakes release cleanly without sticking and cake mix does not get burned on
EASY TO CLEAN - Double layer non-stick coating makes it easy to clean after baking by simply washing up in the sink, or in the dishwasher
5 YEAR NON-STICK GUARANTEE by Judge Homewares. Judge has been trusted by families all over the world for its traditional family values, high performance products and award-winning customer service
description: From the manufacturer ABOUT JUDGE BAKEWARE Judge is best known for its pans that have been a favourite in homes for more than a century and are known all over the world for their high quality and impressive performance. The Judge Bakeware collection brings the same high standards to a wide variety of tins, trays and roasters for excellent results and long life. KEY FEATURES: 0.6mm Carbon Steel for even heat distribution Rolled edges for safety and strength Rust resistant High performance 2 coat non-stick inside and outside Extensively tested Fridge and freezer safe Oven safe to 240° Dishwasher safe PEACE OF MIND Judge is a long-established British firm, based in Bristol, England, built on traditional family values. You can buy with reassurance thanks to their outstanding quality.
